title: Repository deep cleanup and layout normalization
goal: Retire historical audit/process artifacts, normalize the frontend/backend directory boundary (Go module into backend/, test assets into their owning side), and remove orphan tooling bundles without changing any runtime behavior.

in: delete historical process artifacts: docs/{assessments,remediations,archive,superpowers,harness/tasks}, DRIFT_AUDIT, deliverable-assessment, SESSION_DECISIONS, DEFERRED_CODE_BACKLOG, .harness/{evidence,tasks} history, releases/, .codex/tasks, .github/pr-body.txt
remove orphan frontend/.codex OMX bundle, frontend/screenshots, committed backend/uploads binaries
move go.mod/go.sum/.golangci.yml into backend/ and rewrite module import paths
move tests/fixtures/system-import-export to frontend/tests/fixtures and tests/performance to backend/tests/performance
clean dead documentation links caused by the retirement and refresh REPOSITORY_LAYOUT
out: harness governance framework retirement (docs/harness specs, .agents, scripts/harness, CI gates all stay)
any runtime code behavior change beyond import-path rewrites
grafana/, database/, config/ root directories (kept per layout contract)

taskDoc: none — user-directed cleanup executed interactively; decision record in this manifest and evidence summary
humanGates: user selected cleanup scope interactively (audit-artifact retirement only, governance framework retained)
user confirmed go.mod relocation into backend/ accepting import rewrite
user confirmed .harness history deletion was intentional, not accidental
